a:r.a:t: Handoff Artifacts — Typed Worker-to-Worker Data Pipeline
runtime/artifacts.py defines two kinds of artifacts. Workspace artifacts = files an agent produced (download://). Handoff artifacts = structured data passed between coordinator workers (handoff://).

register_handoff_artifact(session, artifact_type, data, ...) stores in session.metadata. KernelCoordinatorController._prepare_handoff_artifacts() creates artifacts from each TaskResult. Workers call list_handoff_artifacts(session, allowed_consumers=['rag_worker']) to find their inputs.
